scripts.build: npm run build -w @patrol/shared && npm run build -w @patrol/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @patrol/shared && npm run typecheck -w @patrol/backend && npm run typecheck -w @patrol/shared
scripts.backend:dev: npm run build -w @patrol/shared && npm run start:dev -w @patrol/backend
scripts.backend:migration:run: npm run build -w @patrol/shared && npm run migration:run -w @patrol/backend
scripts.backend:seed:manual: npm run build -w @patrol/shared && npm run seed:manual -w @patrol/backend
